report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides — Stablechains Guide 2026 (Circle Arc, Plasma, Stripe Tempo) and Crypto Index Funds Guide 2026 (DeFi indexes, ETFs, onchain baskets) — with full SEO optimization and PUBLISH_QUEUE entries.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Stablechains: Identified 3 leading projects (Circle Arc, Plasma, Stripe Tempo) plus Noble as cross-chain stablecoin hub. Plasma live with $3.83B TVL; Arc and Tempo in testnet with 2026 mainnet targets. Stripe Tempo raised $500M at $5B valuation with Mastercard/UBS/Visa partnerships.

Crypto Index Funds: Mapped 4 structural models (DeFi protocols, CEX products, tokenized funds, regulated ETFs). 35%+ of US retail investors using index strategies in 2026. DeFi market ~$238.5B projected to $770.6B by 2031. 126+ ETF applications pending SEC review.
Both topics confirmed as content gaps — no existing degen0x pages cover stablechains or crypto index fund investing.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Stablechains Guide 2026 (588 lines, ~3000 words, 13 min read) — covers what stablechains are, why they matter, deep dives on Circle Arc/Plasma/Stripe Tempo/Noble, comparison table, risks, and 6 FAQs

Crypto Index Funds Guide 2026 (672 lines, ~3100 words, 13 min read) — covers 4 structural models, key products (DPI, MVI, Bitwise, Hashdex), comparison table, benefits, risks, how-to-buy guide, and 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Stablechains: title='Stablechains Guide 2026: Circle Arc, Plasma & Stripe Tempo Explained | degen0x', target keywords=['stablechains', 'Circle Arc', 'Stripe Tempo', 'Plasma stablechain'], schemas=[ArticleSchema, FAQSchema x6]

Index Funds: title='Crypto Index Funds Guide 2026 — DeFi Indexes, ETFs & Onchain Baskets | degen0x', target keywords=['crypto index funds', 'DeFi index', 'crypto ETF', 'DPI token'], schemas=[ArticleSchema, FAQSchema x6]
Both pages have full OpenGraph + Twitter card metadata, canonical URLs, OG images via /api/og, and Breadcrumb navigation
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
